product_highlights: LiposoFast® Basic — bench-top liposome extruder for precise vesicle size control
LiposoFast® Pro — industrial-scale liposome extrusion for cosmetic manufacturing
Polycarbonate extrusion membranes — calibrated pore sizes from 30–800 nm
Custom liposomal ingredient preparation services for cosmetic actives
notes: Lipex Biomembranes is a Canadian specialist in liposome manufacturing technology and equipment, best known for the LiposoFast® extrusion system that is widely used in research and cosmetic manufacturing to produce highly uniform liposomes. Their extrusion membrane technology enables precise control of liposome size distribution, which is critical for skin penetration optimization and regulatory documentation. Lipex uniquely bridges the gap between liposome equipment and ingredient supply, making them a specialized SKIN-TWIN reference for formulators requiring in-house liposome preparation capabilities.
